text.content: All-steel-radial flotation implement tires for agricultural tanker and trailer applications. Belt stabilized tread provides longest treadwear, high stability, and high resistance to punctures and field hazards. Optimized non-directional block tread pattern provides excellent field traction while minimizing vibration at roading speeds.
